decisions.summary: Added rate limiting middleware to auth endpoint
decisions.rationale: Login endpoint had no throttling — vulnerable to credential stuffing. Added express-rate-limit with 10 req/min per IP.
decisions.risk_acknowledged: Rate limit config may need tuning in production under load balancer (X-Forwarded-For trust)

decisions.summary: Switched password hashing from SHA-256 to bcrypt
decisions.rationale: SHA-256 is fast and unsuitable for password storage. bcrypt with cost factor 12 provides adaptive resistance.
decisions.risk_acknowledged: bcrypt adds ~250ms latency per login — acceptable tradeoff for security
